authors.author: Rich Mullins
Rich Mullins
Unser Gott ist ein mächtiger Gott

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are awesome, You are God, You are an awesome God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, You are all I'm livin' for today Master, Saviour, I have come to seek you Jesus, You are all I'm livin' for today Master, Saviour, I have come to seek your face

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To humble myself and pray I'm gonna shout it

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, You have changed my life forevermore Master, Saviour, I just want the world to know Everywhere I go, I want the world to know Everywhere I go, I'm gonna shout it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our father in heaven establish now your kingdom, All power, dominion be to our awesome God.
